news.title:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd reports Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs.728mn, its highest ever.
Sales volume rose 38%, capacity utilization to 67%, PAT at Rs.4mn, EBITDA margin 11.1%.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd reports Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs.728mn, its highest ever.
Sales volume rose 38%, capacity utilization to 67%, PAT at Rs.4mn, EBITDA margin 11.1%.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction's Umargaon facility to begin commercial production soon.
New MP plant with 200,000-250,000 m3 capacity, INR 75-80 cr CapEx, operational in 10-12 months.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction's Umargaon facility to begin commercial production soon.
New MP plant with 200,000-250,000 m3 capacity, INR 75-80 cr CapEx, operational in 10-12 months.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction's Ramosadi plant targets 80% utilization in 1-2 quarters.
AAC wall panel business aims for 30-40% sales utilization in 3-4 quarters.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction's Ramosadi plant targets 80% utilization in 1-2 quarters.
AAC wall panel business aims for 30-40% sales utilization in 3-4 quarters.

news.title: Bigbloc Construction expects further price realization improvement after a 2-3% rise in Q3 FY26.
news.summary: Bigbloc Construction expects further price realization improvement after a 2-3% rise in Q3 FY26.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction's Q3 net profit rose to ₹4.5M from ₹3M YoY.
Revenue increased to ₹728M in Q3 from ₹568M YoY, showing strong growth.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction's Q3 net profit rose to ₹4.5M from ₹3M YoY.
Revenue increased to ₹728M in Q3 from ₹568M YoY, showing strong growth.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd schedules Q3 and 9M FY2026 earnings call on 21st Jan 2026 at 3:30 PM IST.
The conference call will discuss unaudited financial results and business outlook; no sensitive information will be shared.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd schedules Q3 and 9M FY2026 earnings call on 21st Jan 2026 at 3:30 PM IST.
The conference call will discuss unaudited financial results and business outlook; no sensitive information will be shared.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd announces virtual investor-analyst meetings on Jan 7, 2026, hosted by Churchgate IR.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be discussed; participants include DealWealth, Centrum IA, and others.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd announces virtual investor-analyst meetings on Jan 7, 2026, hosted by Churchgate IR.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be discussed; participants include DealWealth, Centrum IA, and others.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd reported H1 FY2026 earnings and business updates.
The AAC block manufacturer has 13M CBM capacity and a 21.5% 5-year revenue CAGR.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd reported H1 FY2026 earnings and business updates.
The AAC block manufacturer has 13M CBM capacity and a 21.5% 5-year revenue CAGR.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction secures Rs. 2.21 Cr order from L&T Construction for AAC blocks.
The domestic order has a delivery period of 6-9 months; no related party involvement.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction secures Rs. 2.21 Cr order from L&T Construction for AAC blocks.
The domestic order has a delivery period of 6-9 months; no related party involvement.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction's subsidiaries Starbigbloc and Bigbloc Building Elements merge with an appointed date of Apr 1, 2025.
The merger aims to simplify structure, reduce costs, and improve financial health with a 1:1 share exchange ratio.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction's subsidiaries Starbigbloc and Bigbloc Building Elements merge with an appointed date of Apr 1, 2025.
The merger aims to simplify structure, reduce costs, and improve financial health with a 1:1 share exchange ratio.

news.title:
BIGBLOC Construction surged 8.7% on Nov 25, closing at ₹57.49.
The rise reflects renewed investor interest despite a challenging YTD performance.
news.summary:
BIGBLOC Construction surged 8.7% on Nov 25, closing at ₹57.49.

news.title:
BIGBLOC hits new 52-week low at Rs. 48.5, down 59% YoY.
Challenged by high Debt/EBITDA and 6 consecutive negative quarters.
news.summary:
BIGBLOC hits new 52-week low at Rs. 48.5, down 59% YoY.
Challenged by high Debt/EBITDA and 6 consecutive negative quarters.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction held its Q2 and H1 FY26 earnings call on Nov 10, 2025.
The call focused on financial performance for Q2 and H1 FY26.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction held its Q2 and H1 FY26 earnings call on Nov 10, 2025.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd reported Q2 FY26 revenue of Rs. 673M, up 30.3% YoY, with improved capacity utilization at 62%.
AAC block sales grew 43.7% YoY; upcoming chemical facility to diversify product portfolio and boost growth.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction Ltd reported Q2 FY26 revenue of Rs. 673M, up 30.3% YoY, with improved capacity utilization at 62%.
AAC block sales grew 43.7% YoY; upcoming chemical facility to diversify product portfolio and boost growth.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction posted Q2 net loss of ₹11.8M vs ₹21.3M profit YoY.
Q2 revenue rose to ₹673M from ₹516.5M YoY despite net loss.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction posted Q2 net loss of ₹11.8M vs ₹21.3M profit YoY.
Q2 revenue rose to ₹673M from ₹516.5M YoY despite net loss.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction proposes merging with Starbigbloc to form Bigbloc Elements.
The merger aims to create a diversified and robust entity.
news.summary:
Bigbloc Construction proposes merging with Starbigbloc to form Bigbloc Elements.
The merger aims to create a diversified and robust entity.

news.title:
Bigbloc Construction's board approved merger of two subsidiaries.
Merger targets strategic growth, efficiency; awaits regulatory approvals.
news.summary:
